info.name: Pioneer DDJ-FLX4 (Custom)
info.author: Robert904, ElHanko
info.description: Community-maintained custom Mixxx MIDI mapping for the Pioneer DDJ-FLX4. Not an official Pioneer or Mixxx default mapping. Focused on predictable behavior, consistent LED feedback and a Pioneer-like workflow without automation gimmicks.

control.description: BROWSE - rotate - Scroll tracklist/tree view
BROWSE +SHIFT - Zoom waveform
BROWSE - press - Move cursor between track list and tree view
BROWSE +SHIFT - press - Move cursor between track list and tree view
LOAD (DECK1) - press - load selected track / double press instant doubles
LOAD (DECK2) - press - load selected track / double press instant doubles
SHIFT + LOAD (DECK1) - press - toggle maximize/minimize library
SHIFT + LOAD (DECK2) - press - currently unused
Shift (DECK1)
Shift (DECK2)
PLAY/PAUSE (DECK1) - press - Play/Pause
PLAY/PAUSE +SHIFT (DECK1) - press - Reverse playback in Slip Mode while held (Censor)
PLAY/PAUSE (DECK2) - press - Play/Pause
PLAY/PAUSE +SHIFT (DECK2) - press - Reverse playback in Slip Mode while held (Censor)
CUE (DECK1) - press - Set/Call Cue, Back Cue
CUE +SHIFT (DECK1) - press - Jump to track start
CUE (DECK2) - press - Set/Call Cue, Back Cue
CUE +SHIFT (DECK2) - press - Jump to track start
JOG DIAL PLATTER Vinyl mode On (DECK1) - rotate - Scratch
JOG DIAL PLATTER Vinyl mode Off (DECK1) - rotate - Pitch bend
JOG DIAL PLATTER +SHIFT (DECK1) - rotate - Search (Fast Pitch bend)
JOG DIAL PLATTER (DECK1) - touch - enable (on touch) / disable (on release) Scratching/Pitch bend
JOG DIAL PLATTER +SHIFT (DECK1) - touch - enable (on touch) / disable (on release) highspeed Pitch bend
JOG DIAL SIDE (DECK1) - rotate - Pitch bend
JOG DIAL PLATTER Vinyl mode On (DECK2) - rotate - Scratch
JOG DIAL PLATTER Vinyl mode Off (DECK2) - rotate - Pitch bend
JOG DIAL PLATTER +SHIFT (DECK2) - rotate - Search (Fast Pitch bend)
JOG DIAL PLATTER (DECK2) - touch - enable (on touch) / disable (on release) Scratching/Pitch bend
JOG DIAL PLATTER +SHIFT (DECK2) - touch - enable (on touch) / disable (on release) highspeed Pitch bend
JOG DIAL SIDE (DECK2) - rotate - Pitch bend
TEMPO (DECK1) - fader - Tempo control LSB
TEMPO (DECK1) - fader - Tempo control MSB
TEMPO (DECK2) - fader - Tempo control LSB
TEMPO (DECK2) - fader - Tempo control MSB
BEAT SYNC (DECK1) - press - Beat Sync to Master deck
BEAT SYNC LONG PRESS (DECK1) - press - Set as Master deck
BEAT SYNC +SHIFT (DECK1) - press - change Tempo range
BEAT SYNC (DECK2) - press - Beat Sync to Master deck
BEAT SYNC LONG PRESS (DECK2) - press - Set as Master deck
BEAT SYNC +SHIFT (DECK2) - press - change Tempo range
LOOP IN/4 BEAT (DECK1) - press - Set loop in
LOOP IN/4 BEAT (DECK2) - press - Set loop in
LOOP OUT (DECK1) - press - Set loop out
LOOP OUT (DECK2) - press - Set loop out
4BEAT/EXIT (DECK1) - press - (loop off) 4-beat loop, (loop on) Loop exit
4BEAT/EXIT (DECK2) - press - (loop off) 4-beat loop, (loop on) Loop exit
4BEAT/EXIT +SHIFT (DECK1) - press - Vinyl Mode
4BEAT/EXIT +SHIFT (DECK2) - press - Vinyl Mode
SHIFT + LOOP IN (DECK1) - Loop in adjust (using jog wheel)
SHIFT + LOOP IN (DECK2) - Loop in adjust (using jog wheel)
SHIFT + LOOP OUT (DECK1) - Loop out adjust (using jog wheel)
SHIFT + LOOP OUT (DECK2) - Loop out adjust (using jog wheel)
CUE/LOOP CALL LEFT (DECK1) - press - half active loop
CUE/LOOP CALL LEFT + SHIFT (DECK1) - press - quick jump back
CUE/LOOP CALL LEFT (DECK2) - press - half active loop
CUE/LOOP CALL LEFT + SHIFT (DECK2) - press - quick jump back
CUE/LOOP CALL LEFT (DECK1) - press - double active loop
CUE/LOOP CALL RIGHT + SHIFT (DECK1) - press - quick jump forwards
CUE/LOOP CALL LEFT (DECK2) - press - double active loop
CUE/LOOP CALL RIGHT + SHIFT (DECK2) - press - quick jump forwards
CROSSFADER - slider
CROSSFADER - slider
CHANNELFADER - slider
CHANNELFADER - slider
CHANNELFADER - slider
CHANNELFADER - slider
Shift + Left CUE - Toggle quantize on/off (Deck1)
Shift + Right CUE - Toggle quantize on/off (Deck2)
TRIM - rotate
TRIM - rotate
TRIM - rotate
TRIM - rotate
EQ HI - rotate
EQ MID - rotate
EQ LOW - rotate
EQ HI - rotate
EQ MID - rotate
EQ LOW - rotate
EQ HI - rotate
EQ MID - rotate
EQ LOW - rotate
EQ HI - rotate
EQ MID - rotate
EQ LOW - rotate
CUE Channel - press - toggle Headphone Cue
CUE Channel - press - toggle Headphone Cue
HEADPHONES MIXING - rotate - Monitor Balance
HEADPHONES MIXING - rotate - Monitor Balance
FILTER CH1 - rotate - Filter Effect Knob (MSB, script)
FILTER CH1 - rotate - Filter Effect Knob (LSB, script)
FILTER CH2 - rotate - Filter Effect Knob (MSB, script)
FILTER CH2 - rotate - Filter Effect Knob (LSB, script)
SMART CFX - press - toggle Smart CFX mode
SMART CFX +SHIFT - press - cycle Smart CFX preset
BEAT FX SELECT - press - cycle Beat FX groups
BEAT FX SELECT +SHIFT - press - cycle Beat FX groups backwards
BEAT LEFT - press - cycle variants inside current Beat FX group backwards
BEAT RIGHT - press - cycle variants inside current Beat FX group forward
BEAT FX CH SELECT CH1 - slide - target Deck 1 (FX1 / EffectUnit1)
BEAT FX CH SELECT CH2 - slide - target Deck 2 (FX2 / EffectUnit2)
BEAT FX LEVEL/DEPTH - rotate (MSB) CH1
BEAT FX LEVEL/DEPTH - rotate (LSB) CH1
BEAT FX LEVEL/DEPTH - rotate (MSB) CH2
BEAT FX LEVEL/DEPTH - rotate (LSB) CH2
BEAT FX ON/OFF - press - toggle chain enabled for selected BeatFX target(s) + update LED
BEAT FX ON/OFF - press - toggle chain enabled for selected BeatFX target(s) + update LED
BEAT FX ON/OFF +SHIFT - press - disable chain for selected BeatFX target(s) + update LED
BEAT FX ON/OFF +SHIFT - press - disable chain for selected BeatFX target(s) + update LED
HOT CUE MODE (DECK1) - press - set hotcue mode
HOT CUE MODE (DECK2) - press - set hotcue mode
KEYBOARD MODE (DECK1) - press - set keyboard mode
KEYBOARD MODE (DECK2) - press - set keyboard mode
PAD FX1 MODE (DECK1) - press - set pad fx1 mode
PAD FX1 MODE (DECK2) - press - set pad fx1 mode
PAD FX2 MODE (DECK1) - press - set pad fx2 mode
PAD FX2 MODE (DECK2) - press - set pad fx2 mode
BEAT JUMP MODE (DECK1) - press - set beat jump mode
BEAT JUMP MODE (DECK2) - press - set beat jump mode
BEAT LOOP MODE (DECK1) - press - set beat loop mode
BEAT LOOP MODE (DECK2) - press - set beat loop mode
SAMPLER MODE (DECK1) - press - set sampler mode
SAMPLER MODE (DECK2) - press - set sampler mode
KEY SHIFT MODE (DECK1) - press - set key shift mode
KEY SHIFT MODE (DECK2) - press - set key shift mode
PAD 1 (DECK1) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 1 +SHIFT (DECK1) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 1 (DECK2) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 1 +SHIFT (DECK2) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 2 (DECK1) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 2 +SHIFT (DECK1) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 2 (DECK2) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 2 +SHIFT (DECK2) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 3 (DECK1) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 3 +SHIFT (DECK1) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 3 (DECK2) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 3 +SHIFT (DECK2) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 4 (DECK1) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 4 +SHIFT (DECK1) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 4 (DECK2) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 4 +SHIFT (DECK2) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 5 (DECK1) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 5 +SHIFT (DECK1) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 5 (DECK2) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 5 +SHIFT (DECK2) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 6 (DECK1) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 6 +SHIFT (DECK1) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 6 (DECK2) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 6 +SHIFT (DECK2) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 7 (DECK1) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 7 +SHIFT (DECK1) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 7 (DECK2) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 7 +SHIFT (DECK2) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 8 (DECK1) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 8 +SHIFT (DECK1) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 8 (DECK2) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 8 +SHIFT (DECK2) HOT CUE MODE - press
PAD 1 (DECK1) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Toggle Stem 1
PAD 1 +SHIFT (DECK1) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Only Stem 1 active
PAD 1 (DECK2) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Toggle Stem 1
PAD 1 +SHIFT (DECK2) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Only Stem 1 active
PAD 2 (DECK1) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Toggle Stem 2
PAD 2 +SHIFT (DECK1) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Only Stem 2 active
PAD 2 (DECK2) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Toggle Stem 2
PAD 2 +SHIFT (DECK2) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Only Stem 2 active
PAD 3 (DECK1) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Toggle Stem 3
PAD 3 +SHIFT (DECK1) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Only Stem 3 active
PAD 3 (DECK2) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Toggle Stem 3
PAD 3 +SHIFT (DECK2) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Only Stem 3 active
PAD 4 (DECK1) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Toggle Stem 4
PAD 4 +SHIFT (DECK1) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Only Stem 4 active
PAD 4 (DECK2) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Toggle Stem 4
PAD 4 +SHIFT (DECK2) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Only Stem 4 active
PAD 5 (DECK1) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Toggle Stem 1 FX
PAD 5 +SHIFT (DECK1) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Only Stem 1 FX active
PAD 5 (DECK2) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Toggle Stem 1 FX
PAD 5 +SHIFT (DECK2) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Only Stem 1 FX active
PAD 6 (DECK1) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Toggle Stem 2 FX
PAD 6 +SHIFT (DECK1) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Only Stem 2 FX active
PAD 6 (DECK2) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Toggle Stem 2 FX
PAD 6 +SHIFT (DECK2) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Only Stem 2 FX active
PAD 7 (DECK1) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Toggle Stem 3 FX
PAD 7 +SHIFT (DECK1) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Only Stem 3 FX active
PAD 7 (DECK2) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Toggle Stem 3 FX
PAD 7 +SHIFT (DECK2) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Only Stem 3 FX active
PAD 8 (DECK1) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Toggle Stem 4 FX
PAD 8 +SHIFT (DECK1) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Only Stem 4 FX active
PAD 8 (DECK2) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Toggle Stem 4 FX
PAD 8 +SHIFT (DECK2) KEYBOARD MODE - press - Only Stem 4 FX active
PAD FX1 Deck1 Pad1
PAD FX1 Deck1 Pad1 + SHIFT
PAD FX1 Deck1 Pad2
PAD FX1 Deck1 Pad2 + SHIFT
PAD FX1 Deck1 Pad3
PAD FX1 Deck1 Pad3 + SHIFT
PAD FX1 Deck1 Pad4
PAD FX1 Deck1 Pad4 + SHIFT
PAD FX1 Deck1 Pad5
PAD FX1 Deck1 Pad5 + SHIFT
PAD FX1 Deck1 Pad6
PAD FX1 Deck1 Pad6 + SHIFT
PAD FX1 Deck1 Pad7
PAD FX1 Deck1 Pad7 + SHIFT
PAD FX1 Deck1 Pad8
PAD FX1 Deck1 Pad8 + SHIFT
PAD FX1 Deck2 Pad1
PAD FX1 Deck2 Pad1 + SHIFT
PAD FX1 Deck2 Pad2
PAD FX1 Deck2 Pad2 + SHIFT
PAD FX1 Deck2 Pad3
PAD FX1 Deck2 Pad3 + SHIFT

PAD FX1 Deck2 Pad4 + SHIFT

PAD FX1 Deck2 Pad5 + SHIFT

PAD FX1 Deck2 Pad8
PAD FX1 Deck2 Pad8 + SHIFT
PAD FX2 Deck1 Pad1
PAD FX2 Deck1 Pad1 + SHIFT
PAD FX2 Deck1 Pad2
PAD FX2 Deck1 Pad2 + SHIFT

PAD FX2 Deck1 Pad3 + SHIFT

PAD FX2 Deck1 Pad7 + SHIFT

PAD FX2 Deck1 Pad8 + SHIFT
PAD FX2 Deck2 Pad1
PAD FX2 Deck2 Pad1 + SHIFT
PAD FX2 Deck2 Pad2
PAD FX2 Deck2 Pad2 + SHIFT
PAD FX2 Deck2 Pad3
PAD FX2 Deck2 Pad3 + SHIFT
PAD FX2 Deck2 Pad4
PAD FX2 Deck2 Pad4 + SHIFT
PAD FX2 Deck2 Pad5
PAD FX2 Deck2 Pad5 + SHIFT
PAD FX2 Deck2 Pad6
PAD FX2 Deck2 Pad6 + SHIFT
PAD FX2 Deck2 Pad7
PAD FX2 Deck2 Pad7 + SHIFT
PAD FX2 Deck2 Pad8
PAD FX2 Deck2 Pad8 + SHIFT
PAD 1 (DECK1) BEAT LOOP MODE - press - 1/4 Beatloop
PAD 1 (DECK2) BEAT LOOP MODE - press - 1/4 Beatloop
PAD 2 (DECK1) BEAT LOOP MODE - press - 1/2 Beatloop
PAD 2 (DECK2) BEAT LOOP MODE - press - 1/2 Beatloop
PAD 3 (DECK1) BEAT LOOP MODE - press - 1/1 Beatloop
PAD 3 (DECK2) BEAT LOOP MODE - press - 1/1 Beatloop
PAD 4 (DECK1) BEAT LOOP MODE - press - 2 Beatloop
PAD 4 (DECK2) BEAT LOOP MODE - press - 2 Beatloop
PAD 5 (DECK1) BEAT LOOP MODE - press - 4 Beatloop
PAD 5 (DECK2) BEAT LOOP MODE - press - 4 Beatloop
PAD 6 (DECK1) BEAT LOOP MODE - press - 8 Beatloop
PAD 6 (DECK2) BEAT LOOP MODE - press - 8 Beatloop
PAD 7 (DECK1) BEAT LOOP MODE - press - 16 Beatloop
PAD 7 (DECK2) BEAT LOOP MODE - press - 16 Beatloop
PAD 8 (DECK1) BEAT LOOP MODE - press - 32 Beatloop
PAD 8 (DECK2) BEAT LOOP MODE - press - 32 Beatloop
BEATJUMP PAD 1 (DECK1) - beatjump_1_backward
BEATJUMP PAD 2 (DECK1) - beatjump_1_forward
BEATJUMP PAD 3 (DECK1) - beatjump_2_backward
BEATJUMP PAD 4 (DECK1) - beatjump_2_forward
BEATJUMP PAD 5 (DECK1) - beatjump_4_backward
BEATJUMP PAD 6 (DECK1) - beatjump_4_forward
BEATJUMP PAD 7 (DECK1) - beatjump_32_backward
BEATJUMP PAD 8 (DECK1) - beatjump_32_forward
BEATJUMP PAD 1 (DECK2) - beatjump_1_backward
BEATJUMP PAD 2 (DECK2) - beatjump_1_forward
BEATJUMP PAD 3 (DECK2) - beatjump_2_backward
BEATJUMP PAD 4 (DECK2) - beatjump_2_forward
BEATJUMP PAD 5 (DECK2) - beatjump_4_backward
BEATJUMP PAD 6 (DECK2) - beatjump_4_forward
BEATJUMP PAD 7 (DECK2) - beatjump_32_backward
BEATJUMP PAD 8 (DECK2) - beatjump_32_forward
PAD 1 (LEFT) SAMPLE MODE - press - Play Sample or Load Track
PAD 1 (LEFT)+SHIFT SAMPLE MODE - press - Stop Playback or Eject Track
PAD 2 (LEFT) SAMPLE MODE - press - Play Sample or Load Track
PAD 2 (LEFT)+SHIFT SAMPLE MODE - press - Stop Playback or Eject Track
PAD 3 (LEFT) SAMPLE MODE - press - Play Sample or Load Track
PAD 3 (LEFT)+SHIFT SAMPLE MODE - press - Stop Playback or Eject Track
PAD 4 (LEFT) SAMPLE MODE - press - Play Sample or Load Track
PAD 4 (LEFT)+SHIFT SAMPLE MODE - press - Stop Playback or Eject Track
PAD 5 (LEFT) SAMPLE MODE - press - Play Sample or Load Track
PAD 5 (LEFT)+SHIFT SAMPLE MODE - press - Stop Playback or Eject Track
PAD 6 (LEFT) SAMPLE MODE - press - Play Sample or Load Track
PAD 6 (LEFT)+SHIFT SAMPLE MODE - press - Stop Playback or Eject Track
PAD 7 (LEFT) SAMPLE MODE - press - Play Sample or Load Track
PAD 7 (LEFT)+SHIFT SAMPLE MODE - press - Stop Playback or Eject Track
PAD 8 (LEFT) SAMPLE MODE - press - Play Sample or Load Track
PAD 8 (LEFT)+SHIFT SAMPLE MODE - press - Stop Playback or Eject Track
PAD 1 (RIGHT) SAMPLE MODE - press - Play Sample or Load Track
PAD 1 (Right)+SHIFT SAMPLE MODE - press - Stop Playback or Eject Track
PAD 2 (RIGHT) SAMPLE MODE - press - Play Sample or Load Track
PAD 2 (Right)+SHIFT SAMPLE MODE - press - Stop Playback or Eject Track
PAD 3 (RIGHT) SAMPLE MODE - press - Play Sample or Load Track
PAD 3 (Right)+SHIFT SAMPLE MODE - press - Stop Playback or Eject Track
PAD 4 (RIGHT) SAMPLE MODE - press - Play Sample or Load Track
PAD 4 (Right)+SHIFT SAMPLE MODE - press - Stop Playback or Eject Track
PAD 5 (RIGHT) SAMPLE MODE - press - Play Sample or Load Track
PAD 5 (Right)+SHIFT SAMPLE MODE - press - Stop Playback or Eject Track
PAD 6 (RIGHT) SAMPLE MODE - press - Play Sample or Load Track
PAD 6 (Right)+SHIFT SAMPLE MODE - press - Stop Playback or Eject Track
PAD 7 (RIGHT) SAMPLE MODE - press - Play Sample or Load Track
PAD 7 (Right)+SHIFT SAMPLE MODE - press - Stop Playback or Eject Track
PAD 8 (RIGHT) SAMPLE MODE - press - Play Sample or Load Track
PAD 8 (Right)+SHIFT SAMPLE MODE - press - Stop Playback or Eject Track
PAD 1 (DECK1) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - No pitch modification
PAD 1 +SHIFT (DECK1) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - Increase the pitch by 1 semitone
PAD 1 (DECK2) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - No pitch modification
PAD 1 +SHIFT (DECK2) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - Increase the pitch by 1 semitone
PAD 2 (DECK1) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - Set pitch to one semitone up
PAD 2 +SHIFT (DECK1) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - Increase the pitch by 2 semitones
PAD 2 (DECK2) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - Set pitch to one semitone up
PAD 2 +SHIFT (DECK2) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - Increase the pitch by 2 semitones
PAD 3 (DECK1) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - Set the pitch to 2 semitones up
PAD 3 +SHIFT (DECK1) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - Increase the pitch by 3 semitones
PAD 3 (DECK2) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - Set the pitch to 2 semitones up
PAD 3 +SHIFT (DECK2) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - Increase the pitch by 3 semitones
PAD 4 (DECK1) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - Set the pitch to 3 semitones up
PAD 4 +SHIFT (DECK1) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - Increase the pitch by 4 semitones
PAD 4 (DECK2) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - Set the pitch to 3 semitones up
PAD 4 +SHIFT (DECK2) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - Increase the pitch by 4 semitones
PAD 5 (DECK1) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - Set the pitch to 3 semitones down
PAD 5 +SHIFT (DECK1) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - Decrease the pitch by 1 semitons
PAD 5 (DECK2) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - Set the pitch to 3 semitones down
PAD 5 +SHIFT (DECK2) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - Decrease the pitch by 1 semitone
PAD 6 (DECK1) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - Set the pitch to 2 semitones down
PAD 6 +SHIFT (DECK1) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - Decrease the pitch by 2 semitones
PAD 6 (DECK2) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - Set the pitch to 2 semitones down
PAD 6 +SHIFT (DECK2) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - Decrease the pitch by 2 semitones
PAD 7 (DECK1) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - Set the pitch to 1 semitones down
PAD 7 +SHIFT (DECK1) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - Decrease the pitch by 3 semitones
PAD 7 (DECK2) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - Set the pitch to 1 semitones down
PAD 7 +SHIFT (DECK2) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - Decrease the pitch by 3 semitones
PAD 8 (DECK1) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - No pitch modification
PAD 8 +SHIFT (DECK1) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - Decrease the pitch by 4 semitones
PAD 8 (DECK2) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - No pitch modification
PAD 8 +SHIFT (DECK2) KEY SHIFT MODE - press - Decrease the pitch by 4 semitones
